Reavers.title: Reavers
Reavers.description: A once civilised species, driven to insanity whilst lost on the fringes of space.

Pirates.title: Pirates
Pirates.description: Let down and forgotten by society, they must now pillage and plunder whatever they can in order to survive.

SplinterFaction.title: Splinter Faction
SplinterFaction.description: A breakaway faction that has found itself dispersed throughout the Slog.
